growth_records.medium: HaHa-medium (HaHa_100V) with 0.1% (w/v) purified diatom sulfated alpha-1,3-mannan as limiting carbon source

up.units: not reported as a flux; mannan provided at 0.1% (w/v)=1 g/L, decreased over ~1 week concurrent with growth (negative correlation mannan vs OD600: y=-5.62x+1.09, P=1e-18, R2=0.96)
up.method: biocatalytic enzymatic quantification of mannose after PbSulf1-GH195/PbGH92_1/PbSulf2 digestion

growth_records.cite: Krull, J. et al. Sulfated mannan of diatoms selects host-specific microbiota in the sunlit ocean. Microbiome (2026). DOI:10.1186/s40168-026-02379-9. [PMC13063451]
growth_records.snippet: Polaribacter sp. Hel1_33_49 grown with purified mannan for one week at 18 C. ... The bacteria grew to an OD600 of 0.2 when providing 0.1% (w/v) of the mannan as the limiting carbon source. Mannan concentration and bacterial abundance were n
growth_records.notes: No specific growth rate (mu), doubling time, or uptake rate in mmol/gDW/h is reported; only OD600 endpoints and a mannan-vs-OD600 negative correlation. Growth reported as OD600 ~0.2 (dedicated Fig.4C experiment) and OD600 0.410 in the comparative strain experiment (Fig S3-S6). Substrate consumed = the purified diatom C6-sulfated alpha-1,3-mannan (~95 mol% mannose, ~equimolar sulfate:mannose); provided at 0.1% w/v = 1 g/L. Temperature 18 C stated explicitly. Medium = HaHa-medium (HaHa_100V) + 0.1 mg/mL yeast extract + 3.5% Sea Salt + N and phosphate (full composition not given). No pH stated. Cannot derive qS: no time-resolved substrate/biomass numbers and no biomass-per-OD conversion given. Marine Bacteroidota, PUL-positive; degrades mannan to mannose+sulfate via a four-enzyme pathway.

growth_records.medium: HaHa-medium (HaHa_100V) with 0.1 mg/mL yeast extract + mannan-containing anionic exudate (0.5-5 M NaCl AEX fraction) as limited carbon source

up.units: consumed (mannan removed from culture when PUL present); no flux reported
up.method: OD600 growth + carbohydrate-PAGE / enzymatic mannan quantification

growth_records.cite: Krull, J. et al. Sulfated mannan of diatoms selects host-specific microbiota in the sunlit ocean. Microbiome (2026). DOI:10.1186/s40168-026-02379-9. [PMC13063451]
growth_records.snippet: The three strains grew better ... Hel1_33_49 (OD600 0.410), _78 (OD600 0.411), and _96 (OD600 0.383). ... when the sulfated mannan was provided as a limited carbon source, the three strains grew better.
growth_records.notes: Endpoint OD600 = 0.411 on mannan; no mu, doubling time, or uptake flux. Temperature 18 C. Substrate consumed = diatom C6-sulfated alpha-1,3-mannan. Full medium composition not stated (HaHa_100V + yeast extract 0.1 mg/mL + 3.5% Sea Salt). PUL-positive strain; mannan removed when PUL present (Fig S4).

growth_records.medium: HaHa-medium (HaHa_100V) with 0.1 mg/mL yeast extract + diatom sulfated mannan as limited carbon source
growth_records.cite: Krull, J. et al. Sulfated mannan of diatoms selects host-specific microbiota in the sunlit ocean. Microbiome (2026). DOI:10.1186/s40168-026-02379-9. [PMC13063451]
growth_records.snippet: Hel1_33_49 (OD600 0.410), _78 (OD600 0.411), and _96 (OD600 0.383) ... grew better on mannan as a limited carbon source.
growth_records.notes: Endpoint OD600 = 0.383 on mannan; no mu, doubling time, or uptake flux. Temperature 18 C. Substrate consumed = diatom C6-sulfated alpha-1,3-mannan. Full medium composition not stated. PUL-positive strain.

growth_records.medium: HaHa-medium (HaHa_100V) with 0.1 mg/mL yeast extract + diatom sulfated mannan as limited carbon source

up.units: mannan remained unconsumed (no measurable uptake; PUL absent)
up.method: OD600 growth + enzymatic/carbohydrate-PAGE mannan quantification (Fig S4)

growth_records.cite: Krull, J. et al. Sulfated mannan of diatoms selects host-specific microbiota in the sunlit ocean. Microbiome (2026). DOI:10.1186/s40168-026-02379-9. [PMC13063451]
growth_records.snippet: The Hel1_88 strain grew less (OD600 0.212) on mannan in comparison to Hel1_33_49 (0.410), _78 (0.411), and _96 (0.383). The mannan remained unconsumed in the culture of Polaribacter sp. Hel1_88.
growth_records.notes: Negative-control strain lacking the mannan PUL: lower endpoint OD600 = 0.212 and mannan NOT consumed (rate 0). No mu, doubling time, or flux. Temperature 18 C. Useful as a no-uptake control datapoint. Full medium composition not stated.
